plan.title: Intermediate Cutting Split
plan.description: A 4-day plan for intermediate users who want to lose fat while keeping muscle and training intensity high.
plan.benefits: This plan increases weekly activity, raises calorie burn, and helps preserve lean muscle.

ingredient_priorities.name: Chicken Breast
benefits: High protein supports muscle growth and recovery
Low fat makes it ideal for weight loss diets

ingredient_priorities.name: Tilapia
benefits: Low calorie option for weight loss

exercises.name: Overhead Tricep Extension
exercises.description: An overhead movement that targets the triceps, especially the long head.

exercises.name: Decline Bench Press
exercises.description: A bench press variation that places more focus on the lower chest.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
exercises.description: An overhead shoulder press performed with dumbbells.

exercises.name: Machine Tricep Extension
exercises.description: A machine-based isolation exercise for the triceps.

exercises.name: Incline Bench Press
exercises.description: A pressing exercise that emphasizes the upper chest.

exercises.name: Single-Arm Cable Curl
exercises.description: A unilateral cable curl that trains one bicep at a time.

exercises.name: Reverse Curl
exercises.description: A curl variation using an overhand grip to involve the forearms more.

exercises.name: Chin-Up
exercises.description: A pull-up variation using an underhand grip to involve the biceps more.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Curl
exercises.description: A simple bicep curl variation using dumbbells.

exercises.name: Preacher Curl
exercises.description: A supported curl variation that isolates the biceps.

exercises.name: Cable Kickback
exercises.description: A cable isolation exercise that targets the glutes one side at a time.

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raise
exercises.description: A calf exercise performed standing to strengthen the lower legs.

exercises.name: Seated Calf Raise
exercises.description: A seated calf exercise that isolates the calf muscles.

exercises.name: Seated Leg Curl
exercises.description: A seated machine exercise that isolates the hamstrings.

exercises.name: Donkey Calf Raise
exercises.description: A calf raise variation performed with the torso bent forward.

exercises.name: Dead Bug
exercises.description: A core stability exercise that trains control and coordination.

exercises.name: Hanging Leg Raise
exercises.description: A hanging core exercise that emphasizes the lower abs and hip flexors.

exercises.name: Scissor Kick
exercises.description: A lower-ab exercise performed by crossing the legs in a scissor motion.

exercises.name: Lying Leg Raise
exercises.description: A floor-based exercise that targets the lower abs.

exercises.name: Reverse Crunch
exercises.description: An abdominal exercise focused on curling the hips upward to target the lower abs.

plan.title: Beginner Fat-Loss Starter
plan.description: A 3-day push, pull, and legs routine built for beginners who want to lose fat while building basic strength and consistency.
plan.benefits: This plan helps increase calorie burn, improve workout consistency, and preserve muscle while losing weight.
